combat_history.event: Kang Ding-class frigates conducted patrols in Taiwan Strait during PLA exercises following Nancy Pelosi's visit, maintaining defensive positions
combat_history.significance: Demonstrated Taiwan's commitment to maintaining naval presence despite large-scale PLA intimidation exercises

combat_history.event: ROCS Kun Ming conducted joint patrol with coast guard vessels following PLA aircraft incursions into ADIZ
combat_history.significance: Shows integration of naval and coast guard operations in Taiwan's layered defense

combat_history.event: ROCS Kang Ding successfully test-fired indigenous Hsiung Feng III supersonic anti-ship missile
combat_history.significance: Validated Taiwan's indigenous missile capability and reduced dependence on foreign weapons

modernization.description: Replacement of French Exocet MM40 with indigenous Hsiung Feng III supersonic anti-ship missiles, including new fire control systems
modernization.impact: Significantly increased anti-ship capability and range, reduced foreign dependence

modernization.description: Modernization of TAVITAC combat management system, integration with indigenous sensors and datalinks
modernization.impact: Improved network-centric warfare capability and integration with other ROC Navy assets

modernization.description: Potential replacement of Sea Chaparral with more capable indigenous or foreign SAM system
modernization.impact: Would significantly improve area air defense capability against modern threats

vulnerabilities.description: Sea Chaparral missiles are 1970s technology with limited range and capability against modern supersonic missiles and aircraft
vulnerabilities.context: PLA has extensive inventory of supersonic anti-ship missiles and modern fighter-bombers that outrange current SAM systems
vulnerabilities.mitigation: Exploring indigenous SAM development and potential foreign procurement

vulnerabilities.description: Only 16 VLS cells and limited reloads mean sustained combat capability is questionable in high-intensity conflict
vulnerabilities.context: Would face saturation attacks from multiple PLA platforms in any conflict scenario
vulnerabilities.mitigation: Focus on first-strike capability and hit-and-run tactics rather than sustained engagement

vulnerabilities.description: Ships are 20+ years old with some systems becoming obsolete and maintenance becoming more expensive
vulnerabilities.context: Taiwan's defense budget constraints limit major modernization programs while threat environment intensifies
vulnerabilities.mitigation: Selective upgrades focusing on critical systems, extending service life to 2030s

vulnerabilities.description: Only six hulls means limited presence and high operational tempo, reducing training and maintenance time
vulnerabilities.context: Cannot be everywhere at once in a Taiwan Strait crisis, must prioritize missions carefully
vulnerabilities.mitigation: Integration with coast guard and development of asymmetric naval tactics

operational_patterns.typical_deployment: Taiwan Strait patrol, port security, and as flagships for task groups including missile boats
operational_patterns.typical_task_group: 1 frigate with 2-4 missile boats and supporting vessels
operational_patterns.readiness_notes: High operational tempo due to increased PLA activities, maintenance challenges due to age

peer_comparisons.key_differences: Type 054A has superior air defense with 32 VLS cells and HQ-16 SAMs, but Kang Ding has stealth features and potentially superior anti-ship missiles. Chinese frigate has numerical advantage.
peer_comparisons.video_angle: David vs Goliath - how Taiwan's stealth frigates stack up against China's numerical superiority

peer_comparisons.key_differences: Kang Ding is enlarged version with VLS and enhanced combat systems. French ships focus more on overseas patrol while Taiwan variant is optimized for high-intensity warfare.
peer_comparisons.video_angle: How arms sales and technology transfer work - the La Fayette family tree

peer_comparisons.key_differences: Australian ships based on Oliver Hazard Perry class, more traditional design. Kang Ding has better stealth but Adelaide had better air defense (before retirement).
peer_comparisons.video_angle: Regional allies' approaches to frigate design - stealth vs proven systems

peer_comparisons.key_differences: Singapore's ships also La Fayette-derived but with different mission focus. Both emphasize stealth but Formidable has Aster missiles for better air defense.
peer_comparisons.video_angle: How small navies customize European designs for their specific threats
